LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF DANIEL SANDOVAL'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA VAN LINES, INC.'S FIRST AMENDED ANSWER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 13, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 7, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA VAN LINES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2015, TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS THE OPPOSITION. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DANIEL SANDOVAL'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA VAN LINES, INC.'S FIRST AMENDED ANSWER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE OBTAINED LEAVE OF COURT BEFORE FILING ITS AMENDED ANSWER, IT WOULD SERVE NO PRACTICAL PURPOSE TO STRIKE THE ANSWER. DEFENDANT WOULD SUBSEQUENTLY FILE A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND, WHICH WOULD ALMOST CERTAINLY BE GRANTED, GIVEN THERE IS NO TRIAL DATE SET AND DISCOVERY IS STILL ONGOING. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA VAN LINES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off Calendar. Moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and with the Courts minute order of June 13, 2015: "[t]he moving party must immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date." Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Jul-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA VAN LINES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to July 30, 2015, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The court has the opposition. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant North America Van Lines, Inc.S First Amended Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DANIEL SANDOVAL'S Motion To Strike Defendant North America Van Lines, Inc.'s First Amended Answer To Plaintiff's Complaint is denied. Although Defendant should have obtained leave of court before filing its amended answer, it would serve no practical purpose to strike the answer. Defendant would subsequently file a motion for leave to amend, which would almost certainly be granted, given there is no trial date set and discovery is still ongoing. Prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant North America Van Lines, Inc.S First Amended Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DANIEL SANDOVAL'S Motion To Strike Defendant North America Van Lines, Inc.'s First Amended Answer To Plaintiff's Complaint is continued to July 13, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 7, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
